name: io.github.jessinra/lorekeeper
description: Self-improving memory for AI agents. One command, no cloud, no config.
long_description:
Lorekeeper is an MCP server that gives AI agents persistent, self-improving memory.

Install with one command, no cloud, no API keys, no Docker.

**Features**
- Hybrid semantic + keyword search across all stored memories
- Feedback loop that automatically improves memory quality over time
- Interactive dashboard for browsing and managing memories
- Auto-linking between related memories
- Namespace isolation (per-agent or per-project)
- Structured session reflection for autonomous memory curation

**Install**
```bash
pip install lorekeeper-mcp && lorekeeper setup
```
Or ephemeral:
```bash
uvx lorekeeper-mcp
```

tools.name: lore_search
tools.description: Hybrid semantic and keyword search across memories, or bulk-fetch by ID

tools.name: lore_remember
tools.description: Fast one-shot memory insert with auto-generated title

tools.name: lore_insert
tools.description: Structured memory insert with content, links, and inline link creation

tools.name: lore_update
tools.description: Rate memories and links as useful or not — drives the self-improving quality loop

tools.name: lore_forget
tools.description: Soft-delete one or more memories by ID

tools.name: lore_recommend_links
tools.description: Suggest link candidates between a memory and related memories

tools.name: lore_reflect
tools.description: Structured session reflection — submits lessons, decisions, and auto-creates memories

tools.name: lore_processed_sessions
tools.description: List all session IDs that have been processed via lore_reflect
